miniappInAppBrowserBody: Sign-in, payments, and some links work more reliably in your phone’s main browser (Safari or Chrome).
golinkBannerTitle: GoGoLink – Easy to earn cashback by just copy, paste and shop!
golinkBannerInputPlaceholder: Paste your product or shop link here
golinkBannerInfoTooltip: Paste a supported shop or product link, then open it through GoGoCash so your visit can be tracked for cashback where available.
golinkBannerInvalidUrl: Please paste a valid link that starts with http:// or https://
golinkBannerClipboardDenied: Clipboard access was blocked. Paste the link into the field manually.
golinkBannerEmpty: Paste a link first, or allow clipboard access to use Paste and Go.
golinkGuidelineTitle: Easy to earn cashback by GoGoLink
golinkGuidelineSubtitle: Follow these 3 steps to shop and earn with GoGoCash
golinkGuidelineStep1: Go to marketplace to look for the products you want, and tap “Share” to copy the link.
golinkGuidelineStep2: Come back to GoGoCash, click “Paste and Go”, and check your receivable cashback.
golinkGuidelineStep3: Tap “Shop Now” to go directly to the shop in the marketplace, then wait for your cashback to be approved.
golinkResultDemoProductTitle: LA GLACE Pads ลากลาส โทนเนอร์แพด 160ml (Acne Care/Moisturizing/Skin Barrier/Vit C)
golinkResultDisclaimer: Product image, price, and cashback shown here are examples only. Actual rewards depend on the shop and offer terms.
golinkGuidelineHandAlt: Illustration of a hand pointing to the copy-and-paste flow
golinkGuidelineStepIllustrationAlt: Step illustration for GoLink how it works
golinkResultTermExclusionsA: Some brands, categories, or payment types may be excluded from cashback. Promo codes from other sites and certain fulfilment paths may also disqualify a purchase.
golinkResultTermRefundsA: If your order is refunded, cancelled, or not completed, related cashback may be voided or adjusted according to the store and GoGoCash rules.
golinkResultTermTrackingA: Cashback tracking depends on the store confirming your purchase. It can take time to appear, and some sessions may not track if cookies are blocked or checkout was interrupted.
golinkResultTermOtherA: Offer amounts, eligibility, and rules can change. Always review the store page and any campaign terms before you pay.
golinkResultTermLearnMore: Learn more in our shopping guide
golinkResultCashbackTipsScrollHint: Scroll down to read all tips.
golinkResultCashbackTipsInfographicAlt: Cashback tips infographic: excluded Live and Video cart items and how to fix them; check terms and caps; start every purchase from this platform; avoid ad blockers and third-party links; empty cart for some merchants; restart if payment fails; accept store cookies.
favoritePageFindYourBrandDescription: Find your favorite brands, explore new ones, and enjoy cashback on every purchase.
favoritePageEmptyTitle: Your favorite brands list is looking a little empty.
favoritePageEmptyDescription: Time to explore and 'heart' your go-to brands for quick cashback!
favoritePageNoSearchResults: No brands match your search. Try a different name.
productDiscoverEmpty: No product cashback rates are available right now. Browse All Brands instead.
discoverMetaDescription: Browse cashback partners and find the best deals by products.
discoverPageSubtitle: Find the best cashback deals by products.
discoverTermsModalBody:
Purchases made through partner links may be subject to the merchant’s terms, return policies, and eligibility rules for cashback or rewards. GoGoCash displays offers for information; final pricing and availability are set by the partner.

By continuing to the partner site you acknowledge that tracking and rewards depend on partner confirmation and program rules.
discoverEmpty: No partners found. Try adjusting your filters.
Hi! Log in or Sign up here: Hi! Log in or Sign up here
footerRiskDisclaimer: Cashback rates, merchant availability, and product features may change. GoGoCash does not provide financial, investment, or tax advice. Saving Plus and related offerings involve risk; read terms before participating. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
Subscribe to our standard plan for exclu: Subscribe to our standard plan for exclusive benefits.
subscriptionStripeIntro: GoGoPass memberships use Stripe checkout. Open the membership page to compare plans and subscribe.
Invite friends to GOGO CASH & get a: Invite friends to GOGO CASH & get a
Share your link or referral code below a: Share your link or referral code below and enjoy your bonus instantly.
For each friend that you invite: For each friend that you invite
referralSocialShareLabel: Share referral link on social media
referralInstagramCopyHint: Link copied — paste it in your Instagram story or bio.
referralEmptyInvitesTitle: It's been a while since your last invite.
referralEmptyInvitesSubtitle: Share with friends and earn rewards together!
referralStepsTitle: Share with Friends and Get Rewards
referralStepShareFriends: Share it with your friends via chat, email, or social media.
referralFaqExclusionsAnswer: Referral rewards may not apply when a purchase uses excluded payment methods, stacks with certain third-party offers, or is marked ineligible by the merchant. Standard cashback exclusions on the brand offer page still apply.
referralFaqRefundsAnswer: If a referred friend's qualifying purchase is refunded or reversed, related referral rewards may be adjusted or removed according to the program rules.
referralFaqTrackingAnswer: Invites are attributed when friends sign up and shop using your referral link. It may take a short time after purchase for activity to appear here.
referralFaqOtherTermsAnswer: Reward amounts, eligibility, and rules may change over time. Continued use of the referral program means you accept the current terms. See our help center or terms of service for full details.
homeShareReferralDescription: Share your referral link. You earn 10% cashback payout whenever your friend receives cashback in their wallet.
homeShareReferralText: Join GoGoCash with my referral link. You shop and get cashback, and I earn 10% from your cashback payout.
withdrawMethodsEmptyDescription: Choose how you'd like to get paid. Add your preferred payout method below.
withdrawMethodLoadError: We could not load this withdrawal method. Please go back and try again.
withdrawMethodComingSoon: This payout method is not available yet. Please use Bank Account to add a withdrawal method.
withdrawMethodPrivacyDisclaimer: Bank account information is used strictly for fund transfer, refund, and identity verification purposes according to GoGoCash privacy policy and PDPA standards. Please double-check accuracy before proceeding. All bank account data is securely managed and will not be shared externally without your consent.
withdrawMethodFormFillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
Your account will receive funds within 2: Your account will receive funds within 2–3 business days
withdrawTransferNotice: Your withdrawal will be transferred to your chosen method within 2–3 business days.*
withdrawSupportBannerLine1: Report if your cashback wasn't tracked or added after a purchase.
withdrawSupportBannerLine2: Our team will review it for you.
withdrawProfileLoading: Loading your profile. Please try again in a moment.
withdrawKycRequiredToast: Please add your citizen ID and legal address in Profile before withdrawing.
withdrawKycModalBodyLine1: You need to completely fill your address and citizen ID
withdrawKycModalBodyLine2: (or passport ID) before trying to withdraw again
withdrawConfirmBody: Check the details below. When you’re ready, confirm to submit your request.
withdrawHelpTooltipLine1: Total cashback you've earned from all transactions.
withdrawHelpTooltipLine2: Cashback waiting for approval before you can use it.
withdrawHelpTooltipLine3: Cashback you've already withdrawn to your wallet or bank.
withdrawHelpTooltipAriaLabel: Explain total, pending, and withdrawn cashback
cashbackSummaryHelpAriaLabel: Explain total, pending, and withdrawn cashback
cashbackSummaryFriendlySubtitle: A simple snapshot of your rewards — what we’re tracking, what’s still confirming, and what you’ve already received.
cashbackSummaryTotalHint: Every purchase we’re tracking for cashback, all in one place.
cashbackSummaryPendingHint: Usually updates after the store confirms your order.
cashbackSummaryWithdrawnHint: Already sent to your bank or crypto wallet.
walletTransactionsListHelpAll: Shows cashback you earned and money you withdrew. Use search and status above to narrow results.
walletTransactionsListHelpEarning: Each line is cashback after the shop confirms your purchase. Use “Copy order ID” if you need help from support.
walletTransactionsListHelpWithdraw: Each line is a transfer to your bank or wallet. Open a row’s detail from the withdraw flow if you need more info.
walletTransactionsEmptyTitle: It's been a while since your last wallet visit.
walletTransactionsEmptySubtitle: Let's go shopping and save cash on every spend!
walletTransactionsClaimLocalDeviceHint: Shown on this device only from your recent form submit — not confirmed by our servers yet.
headerSearchTrendingSubtitle: Hand-picked stores with standout cashback—tap a shop to explore.
headerSearchTrendingEmpty: No popular stores to show yet. Try searching above.
headerSearchNoMatches: No brands or products match that search—browse popular picks below.
headerSearchPlaceholder: Search brands, stores, products, or cashback
headerSearchAria: Search brands, stores, products, and cashback offers
Explore travel deals and earn cashback: Explore travel deals and earn cashback!
Purchases made with Vouchers or Promo co: Purchases made with Vouchers or Promo codes not featured on our platform
Taxes · Service charges · Shipping and d: Taxes · Service charges · Shipping and delivery
Any rejected, cancelled, refunded, excha: Any rejected, cancelled, refunded, exchanged or returned purchases will not be eligible for Cashback.
For partial returns or exchanges, we'll: For partial returns or exchanges, we'll prorate the Cashback as an adjustment.
Your Cashback may be tracked at a differ: Your Cashback may be tracked at a different rate initially and adjusted to the correct rate when we confirm the transaction details.
Please favorite us to stay updated on gr: Please favorite us to stay updated on great deals.
Check carefully for Cashback exclusions: Check carefully for Cashback exclusions and caps before you buy or book to avoid disappointment. Don't forget the terms and conditions on any promotion and campaign pages
Restart from this platform every time: Restart from this platform every time
Complete your shopping in one go Always: Complete your shopping in one go: Always start from this platform to visit the store directly, for every new transaction. If your store visit is interrupted by an app update or download screen, restart your shopping from our platform.
Don't use adblockers or click on other l: Don't use adblockers or click on other links
For Expedia, you need to clear your cart: For Expedia, you need to clear your cart, close the Expedia app, open this platform to visit the Expedia app or website and complete your purchase there in order to earn Cashback. You need to do this for each purchase.
Restart from this platform if payment fa: Restart from this platform if payment fails
If you encounter payment errors during y: If you encounter payment errors during your purchase, you should restart your visit to the Expedia from this platform to ensure that your Cashback continues to be tracked.
Accept all cookies from the store: Accept all cookies from the store
Expedia can only confirm to us that a tr: Expedia can only confirm to us that a transaction is recorded if you accept all cookies that appear on their pages.
Don't click on any third party links or: Don't click on any third party links or extensions or use VPN or adblocking software, as they could result in your Cashback not being tracked. Some examples include: Facebook ads, Google Ads, other loyalty or cashback extension links.
questPageSignInHint: Sign in to see your personal quest progress and rewards.
questPageWeeklyBody: Complete campaign tasks, stack extra points, and explore featured partner stores from one coordinated quest hub.
questPageWeeklyTitle: Quest missions, ranking, and bonus-store discovery
questDailyAdBody: You must watch for 30 seconds. This ad cannot be skipped.
gogoquestHistoryHeroTitle: See your points, rewards, and how you rank—then plan your next shop.
gogoquestHistoryPageIntro: Earn quest points when you shop through GoGoCash during an active round. Here you can check your score, look back month by month, see bonuses you unlocked, and peek at the leaderboard. Use it to decide when to shop next and which tasks or stores to hit.
gogoquestHistoryPlanStep1: Open Quest to see time-limited tasks and stores that give extra points.
gogoquestHistoryPlanStep2: Start from GoGoCash, then complete checkout at the partner store so your order counts.
gogoquestHistoryPlanStep3: Check this page again to watch your points grow and grab bonuses when you qualify.
gogoquestHistoryRoundShopHint: These are the dates when eligible shopping and tasks can add to your quest score.
gogoquestHistoryPeriodPending: The next quest round is not open yet. We will show the dates here when it starts.
gogoquestHistoryDaysLeft: {count, plural, =0 {Last day of this round} one {# day left in this round} other {# days left in this round}}
gogoquestHistoryRoundEnded: This round has ended. Open Quest to see if a new round or tasks are available.
gogoquestHistoryScoreFootnote: From this round only. Older months are listed below.
gogoquestHistorySignInHint: Sign in to see your quest points and history.
gogoquestHistoryMonthlySectionHint: Taller bars mean a stronger month—use it to spot when you shopped most.
gogoquestHistoryRewardsSectionHint: Extra points or perks unlocked from quests—great to review before the next round.
gogoquestHistoryLeaderboardPickMonth: Which period do you want to see?
gogoquestHistoryLeaderboardNoPeriod: There is no active round or past month to show yet. Come back after the next quest starts.
gogoquestHistoryPlayerDialogError: We could not load this player’s details. Try again later.
gogoquestHistoryPlayerNoRewards: No rewards recorded for this period.
gogoquestHistoryLeaderboardHelp: See how your score compares for the period you picked. Names are shortened to protect privacy. Tap View on a row to see that shopper’s points and rewards for the same dates.
gogoquestHistoryEmptyMonthly: Once you earn quest points, you will see each month here with a simple bar so you can compare at a glance.
gogoquestHistoryEmptyRewards: No bonuses yet—complete quest tasks during a round to unlock extra points and perks.
gogoquestHistoryInsightTitle: A quick read on your months
gogoquestHistoryInsightFirstMonth: First month we have on file: {month} with {points} pts.
gogoquestHistoryInsightFlat: You earned the same in {recentMonth} as in {olderMonth} ({points} pts each).
gogoquestHistoryInsightUp: You earned about {percent}% more points in {recentMonth} than in {olderMonth}.
gogoquestHistoryInsightDown: Points were about {percent}% lower in {recentMonth} than in {olderMonth}—totally normal month to month.
gogoquestHistoryActivityStrip: You picked up quest points in {active} of the last {total} months.
gogoquestHistoryMilestoneTop: You are in first place this round—keep the streak going.
gogoquestHistoryMilestoneGap: About {points} pts to reach first place—every shop through GoGoCash helps.
missingOrdersPageIntroSelfService: Self-service form: add your purchase details, then submit to open LINE and send them to our team. You can follow and track your case directly in the chat.
missingOrdersSectionPurchaseHelp: Choose where you bought the item and enter the same order details you see in the store’s app or confirmation email.
missingOrdersSectionAccountHelp: We match claims using this user ID. It must be the same account you were logged into when you shopped through GoGoCash.
missingOrdersSectionExtraHelp: Notes are optional. Screenshots or receipts are required (up to 5 images, 5 MB each) so our team can review your claim in LINE.
missingOrdersOrderIdHelper: Usually in the order confirmation email or under “My orders” in the store app.
missingOrdersAmountHelper: Total paid in THB (as shown on the order).
missingOrdersDateHint: Tap the field to open your device calendar. Purchase date cannot be in the future.
missingOrdersUserIdMatchHint: Ensure user ID matches the purchasing account
missingOrdersAttachmentHint: Required — add at least 1 image, up to 5 total, 5 MB each (e.g. order confirmation or payment slip).
missingOrdersAttachmentRequired: Please add at least one screenshot or receipt.
missingOrdersAttachmentMaxReached: You can add up to 5 images.
missingOrdersAttachmentFileTooBig: Each image must be 5 MB or smaller.
missingOrdersAttachmentRememberLine: Remember to attach your images in the LINE chat so we can review your claim.
missingOrdersBullet1: Claims must be submitted within 90 days of purchase.
missingOrdersBullet2: Missing conversions can only be reported 3 days after purchase.
missingOrdersBullet3: We cannot track missing conversions for CPC, CPO, CPI, CPUC, CPIO commission models.
missingOrdersSubmittedDescription: You can track the result on order transaction in wallet.
missingOrdersFaqSectionTitle: Need help with cashback? We're here to assist you.
missingOrdersFaq1A: GoGoCash is a cashback platform that rewards you when you shop with partner stores through our links.
missingOrdersFaq2A: Shop via GoGoCash tracked links, complete your purchase, and eligible cashback will show in your wallet after the merchant confirms the order.
missingOrdersFaq3A: Transfers can be delayed if the merchant is still validating the order, if the return window applies, or if additional verification is required.
accountSetupSubtitle: Shopping smoother by getting your withdrawal method ready

profilePrivacyDisclaimer: Your personal information is encrypted and securely stored. We never share your sensitive data with third parties without your explicit consent.

profileMyCashbackUnlinkedBannerAlt: Link MyCashBack with GoGoCash — go to account linking
profileMyCashbackMultipleAccountsDescrip: For users with multiple MyCashBack accounts, you may link all of them to your GoGoCash profile here to manage your balances and activities from one centralized location.
profileSocialHeading: Link to your Social Media for Easy in One-click!
profileCashbackCardHint: See your withdrawable total and how it splits by source.

merchantCashbackRatesDisclaimer: The cashback rates shown above are the maximum possible amounts. Actual rates vary by merchant and specific order conditions. Final approval is at the sole discretion of the merchant; GoGoCash acts as a platform provider for your convenience.
merchantCashbackMaxThbPerTransaction: Cashback maximum up to 50 THB per transaction.
excludedProductsTipLead: No cash back for items added from Live/Videos. You can easily fix this by
excludedProductsTipEmphasis: Remove and re-add the item to your cart.
merchantCashbackTipsIllustrationAlt: Cashback tips: excluded Live and Video cart items; check terms and caps; start from this platform; avoid ad blockers and third-party links; empty cart when required; restart if payment fails; accept store cookies.
authPhoneDevOtpSent: Dev mode: number 123456789 → OTP 123456; number 321654987 → OTP 321654.
authPhoneDevOtpInvalid: Invalid code. In development use 123456 for 123456789 or 321654 for 321654987.
authPhoneOtpErrorAria: The verification code is incorrect. Update the digits or use Resend to request a new code.
authPhoneOtpScreenIntro: A verification code will be sent to your mobile number to confirm this action is being performed by you.
authPhoneOtpSentToLabel: Code is sent to phone number :
authPhoneVerifyNotReady: Phone verification is not available yet. Please use a social sign-in option below.
authPhoneComingSoon: Phone sign-in is not available yet. Please use a social sign-in option below.
authFeatureComingSoon: This sign-in method is not available yet.
linkMyCashbackSubtitle: Manage your activities in one centralized account
linkMyCashbackCardDescription: For MyCashBack users, you may link all of the accounts to your GoGoCash profile here to manage your balances and activities from one centralized location.
linkMyCashbackLinkPlaceholder: Account linking will be available soon.
linkMyCashbackMethodDescription: Please select 'Email' or 'Phone Number' as registered with MyCashBack to ensure your account is linked correctly.
linkMyCashbackMethodConsentPrefix: I consent to share my MyCashBack information.
linkMyCashbackVerifyDescriptionEmail: A verification code will be sent to your email address to confirm this action is being performed by you.
linkMyCashbackVerifyInvalidOtp: That code doesn’t match. Check the code and try again.
linkMyCashbackVerifySuccessDescription: Your contact details have been confirmed. Continue to finish linking your MyCashBack account.
pdpaConsentBannerTitle: We use cookies in the delivery of our services.
pdpaConsentBannerBodyPart1: To learn about the cookies we use and your preferences, read our
pdpaConsentBannerBodyPart2: . By using GoGoCash you agree to our use of cookies for cashback and analytics.
pdpaPrivacyCenterIntro: This page puts you in control. See what data we use for cashback, turn optional uses on or off, download a copy of your information, or ask us to delete it—whenever you need.
pdpaQuickGuide1: Choose optional ways we may use your data (for example marketing, analytics, or partner insights).
pdpaQuickGuide2: Download a machine-readable copy of the personal data we hold about you.
pdpaQuickGuide3: Request deletion of your data or review requests you’ve already sent.
pdpaExportSectionBody: We’ll send your data export to the email address you provided. This may take a little time depending on how much data we store.
pdpaDeleteSectionBody: Deletion is permanent for data we are allowed to erase. Some records must be kept or anonymized where the law requires (for example tax or fraud rules).
pdpaDeleteRetentionNote: Some records may be anonymized instead of deleted where the law requires retention.
pdpaRequestsSectionBody: A short history of portability and deletion requests submitted from this account.
pdpaRequestsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No requests submitted yet.} one {# request on file.} other {# requests on file.}}
pdpaConsentHeroBody: Optional consents let us personalize offers, measure what works, share aggregated insights with partners, and run eligibility checks—so cashback and rewards work smoothly for you.
pdpaAcceptAllOptionalHint: One tap enables marketing, analytics, B2B aggregated insights, and AI credit scoring where applicable. You can turn any item off below.
pdpaAllOptionalEnabled: All optional consents are already on.
pdpaConsentSaveError: Could not save your choice. Please try again.
pdpaCashbackRequiredDescription: We track eligible purchases and cashback while your account is active so we can credit rewards and meet merchant agreements. This is not optional while you use the service.
pdpaPurposeMarketingDesc: Email, SMS, LINE, or push about offers and updates you may like.
pdpaPurposeAnalyticsDesc: Helps us fix bugs, improve flows, and understand feature usage in aggregate.
pdpaPurposeB2bDesc: Anonymous or aggregated trends shared with merchants and partners to improve programs.
pdpaPurposeAiDesc: Automated checks for offers or limits where you choose products that use scoring.
pdpaExportEmailNote: We’ll send your export data to the email address that you provided
pdpaMicroNotice: We collect this information for the stated purpose under PDPA. See Privacy Policy for details.
pdpaAgeVerifyBody: To meet PDPA requirements and unlock the full service, enter your birth date below. You must be over 20 years old to continue.
pdpaAgeVerifyHint: Use your real birth date. Access is available only for users over 20 years old.
pdpaAgeVerifyIncompleteCode: Please enter your birth date, then tap Verify.
pdpaAgeVerifyUnder20: You must be over 20 years old to continue.

membership.metaDescription: GoGoPass membership — ฿49/month or ฿490/year. Fee-free withdrawals, GoGoQuest and My Rating Score boosts, and priority support.
membership.heroH1: Go premium for less than a coffee a week.
membership.pricingSectionSubtitle: Same membership — pick monthly flexibility or annual savings.
membership.trustBilledThb: All charges are in Thai Baht (THB).
membership.trustCancelAnytime: Cancel anytime from your account — no lock-in.
membership.trustAccessThroughPeriod: If you cancel, you keep full access until the end of your paid period.
membership.benefitsHeading: What you get as a member
membership.benefitsSubtitle: Concrete perks you can use — not a points puzzle.
membership.benefitsPointsFootnote: Boosts, fee waivers, and support perks follow in-app rules and eligibility.
membership.savingsSubtitle: Simple math in THB — no hidden FX.
membership.savingsFootnote: That is ฿98 less than paying month-by-month — about 16% off.
membership.calcSubtitle: A quick illustration of member earning power — membership is about much more than points alone.
membership.spendHelp: Adjust the slider or type an amount (฿)
membership.billingAnnualNudge: Annual is pre-selected — lowest effective monthly price with the same full membership.
membership.billingAnnualHint: ~฿41/mo effective · one yearly charge in THB
membership.songkranChip: 3 purchases · ฿5,300 total · Same products, same prices
membership.songkranCallout: Pro members earned 10,600 more points than Free users — from the exact same Songkran trip.
membership.songkranUrgency: 🔥 April GoGoQuest ends in {countdown} · Upgrade now and your next purchase counts immediately
membership.gameboardHeading: The longer you play, the more you earn
membership.gameboardIntro: Interactive preview — tap days and quest rows to see how bonus points stack up.
membership.streakHelp: Choose a plan length, then tap each day you “check in” to preview streak bonus points.
membership.streakGridHelp: Tap days to toggle · green = counted
membership.streakGridAria: Streak calendar, tap each day to mark complete
membership.questHelp: Tap a task when you’d complete it — your sample total updates at the bottom.
membership.socialHeading: Built for real shopping in Thailand
membership.socialSubtitle: Straightforward pricing and partners you already use.
membership.stat1: partner brands where your membership and rewards count
membership.stat2: typical savings when you pick annual vs twelve monthly payments
membership.stat3: per month on the flexible monthly plan

faq.q: What currency am I charged in?
faq.a: All membership charges are in Thai Baht (THB). The price you see is the price you pay — no surprise conversion.
Yes. Cancel from your account whenever you like. You will not be charged again after the current period ends.
You keep full membership access until the end of the billing period you already paid for. After that, your plan ends unless you resubscribe.
Monthly plans renew every month on the same date. Annual plans renew once a year. Stripe sends a receipt for each successful charge.
Right after checkout completes. Withdrawal fee waivers, quest and My Rating Score boosts, and priority support apply according to in-app rules.
Points are valid for 12 months from the date they're earned unless stated otherwise in the app. Membership may include additional perks — see in-app details.

membership.streakZero: Day 0 streak: +0 bonus pts so far
membership.streakFmt: Day {done} streak: +{pts} bonus pts so far

billing.title: My Subscription
billing.cancelNotice: Your subscription will end on {date}. You can reactivate anytime.
billing.paymentFailed: Your last payment failed. Please update your payment method.
billing.noSubBody: Unlock GoGoPass to access exclusive benefits.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: You are charged immediately at checkout. Your plan renews automatically every month or year.
faq.a2: Yes. Go to Account › Billing and click Manage Subscription. You keep access until the end of your billing period.
faq.a3: You revert to the free GoGoCash plan. Unused days are not refunded.
faq.q4: Which currency will I be billed in?
faq.a4: All subscription charges are in Thai Baht (THB), processed securely by Stripe.

subscription.errorToast: Something went wrong. Please try again.

subscriptionBilling.pageSubtitle: GoGoPass is billed in Thai Baht (THB) — 49 THB / month or 490 THB / year.
subscriptionBilling.stripeDisabled: Stripe checkout is not enabled in this environment.
subscriptionBilling.effectiveMonthly: ≈ 41 THB / month when billed annually (490 THB / year)
subscriptionBilling.thbDisclaimer: Prices are in THB including VAT where applicable; charged in THB via Stripe.
subscriptionBilling.noSubscription: You do not have an active subscription yet.
subscriptionBilling.faq1A: You are charged in THB on the schedule you pick (49 THB monthly or 490 THB yearly).
subscriptionBilling.faq2A: Yes. You can cancel from the billing portal; access continues until the end of the paid period unless otherwise stated.
subscriptionBilling.faq3A: Your membership benefits continue until the end of the current billing period, then revert according to your plan terms.
